failure_sim.title: ODP RFC blocking (July 2026)
failure_sim.narrative: If Pendulum Industries had used ODP RFC, the source connector would have failed starting July 2026. Our NetWeaver + Fivetran-triggers path is unaffected — this is the architecture decision the policy forced.

failure_sim.title: NetWeaver RFC credentials rotated
failure_sim.narrative: Fivetran retries with the new credential after Slab updates the secret.

failure_sim.title: Iceberg schema evolved
failure_sim.narrative: Adding a column to KNA1 propagates through bronze → silver → gold without rewriting queries.
